case_title: PORTILLO, EDWIN VS ENTERPRISE RENT-A-CAR et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY PORTILLO, EDWIN AS TO DEFENDANT ENTERPRISE RENT-A-CAR VALASQUEZ, SIDNEY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-28-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ENTERPRISE RENT-A-CAR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTILLO, EDWIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ENTERPRISE RENT-A-CAR VALASQUEZ, SIDNEY $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,530.00, SIDNEY VELASQUEZ IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE-NO PROOF OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT ENTERPRISE RENT-A-CAR VALASQUEZ, SIDNEY
